Description: Ensure that Web Application Firewall (WAF) is enabled to protect web applications from common exploits.
Risk: Without WAF, web applications are exposed to common attacks such as SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), and other OWASP Top 10 threats.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Web Application Firewall.
3. Create a WAF instance (dedicated or cloud).
4. Add protected websites/domains.
5. Configure protection policies and rules.

Recommendation.Text: Enable WAF and configure it to protect all web applications and APIs.
